response: A medieval fortress in Dirleton, East Lothian, Scotland, namely Dirleton Castle, borders on the south side of the coastal area of Yellowcraig. Yellowcraig is a coastal area of forest, beach, and grassland in East Lothian, south-east Scotland, bordered to the north by the Firth of Forth, to the south by the village of Dirleton and Dirleton Castle, to the east by the North Berwick West Links golf course, and to the west by the Archerfield Estate and Links golf courses.
